parameters.query: SELECT source_id, source_name, url, default_category FROM feeds WHERE active = true AND ingest_kind = 'rss' AND consecutive_failures < 5
SELECT source_id, source_name, url, default_category FROM feeds WHERE active = true AND ingest_kind = 'apify_crawl' AND consecutive_failures < 5

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.value: application/rss+xml, application/atom+xml, application/xml, text/xml; q=0.9, */*; q=0.8

parameters.query: SELECT content_hash FROM seen_items WHERE content_hash = ANY($1::text[])

parameters.jsCode:
const fullItems = $input.all().map(it => it.json);

const promptItems = fullItems.map(j => ({
  id: j.content_hash.slice(0, 12),
  source: j.source_name,
  source_id: j.source_id,
  default_category: j.default_category,
  title: j.title,
  published: j.published_at,
  snippet: (j.snippet || '').slice(0, 600)
}));

const systemPrompt = [
  "You are the curation editor for the Honey Bear Financials (HBF) Daily Brief. HBF is a bookkeeping and advisory firm in New Albany, Indiana, serving SMB clients across the Louisville KY metro and broader Indiana/Kentucky region. The firm uses QuickBooks Online and Xero, leans into value pricing and advisory (CAS), and serves clients with revenues from $250K to $20M.",
  "",
  "YOUR JOB: For each news item provided, produce a structured rating with plain-English summary, category, importance score, and action items.",
  "",
  "CATEGORIES (assign exactly one):",
  "- tax_regulatory: IRS/Treasury/FinCEN/state DOR rulings, regs, deadline changes, BOI, Section 174, ERC, payroll tax, sales tax / Wayfair nexus",
  "- industry_practice: firm operations, pricing, AI tools, QBO/Xero/Karbon/Canopy product updates, staffing, CPA pipeline, M&A, advisory growth",
  "- client_smb: small-business pain points, fraud/scam alerts, 1099 changes, payroll updates, bookkeeping how-tos that HBF could repackage for clients",
  "",
  "IMPORTANCE SCORING (0-100, calibrate aggressively, do not cluster):",
  "  90-100: Action-required within 7 days. New federal law, BOI rule change, IRS deadline shift, mass-affecting state change in IN or KY, critical security issue in QBO/Xero.",
  "  75-89:  High-relevance. Specific guidance, meaningful product updates for tools HBF uses, important practice trends, IN/KY state items.",
  "  60-74:  Worth knowing. Industry trends, useful articles, value-pricing content, pipeline issues.",
  "  40-59:  Background context. Big-picture or aspirational content.",
  "  0-39:   Probably should not have made it through prefilter; rate low and move on.",
  "",
  "GEOGRAPHIC WEIGHTING: Add +10 to base score for Indiana-specific items, +8 for Kentucky-specific items, +5 for Ohio Valley regional items.",
  "",
  "SUMMARY RULES:",
  "- 2-3 sentences, max 60 words",
  "- Lead with the concrete change or finding, not background",
  "- Use plain English; assume reader knows accounting but not legal jargon",
  "- Never use em-dashes; use semicolons or commas instead",
  "- Never invent facts; if the title is a teaser and you have no body text, summarize what is genuinely in the snippet only",
  "",
  "ACTION ITEMS: Only emit if there is a concrete action a bookkeeping firm should take in the next 30 days. Empty array is correct most of the time.",
  "",
  "CLIENT_COMM_CANDIDATE: True only if this is something HBF should consider emailing clients about (scam alerts, deadline changes, broadly applicable new rules). Default false.",
  "",
  "Output in the exact JSON format specified. Return all items in the items array, in the order given."
].join('\n');

const promptText = systemPrompt + '\n\n' + `Rate the following ${promptItems.length} items:\n\n${JSON.stringify(promptItems, null, 2)}`;

return [{json: {promptText, originalItems: fullItems, promptItems, itemCount: promptItems.length}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO seen_items (content_hash, source_id, url, title, published_at, importance_score, category, included_in_digest) SELECT * FROM unnest($1::text[], $2::text[], $3::text[], $4::text[], $5::timestamptz[], $6::int[], $7::text[], $8::bool[]) ON CONFLICT (content_hash) DO UPDATE SET importance_score = EXCLUDED.importance_score, category = EXCLUDED.category, included_in_digest = seen_items.included_in_digest OR EXCLUDED.included_in_digest

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $json.allConsidered.map(i => i.content_hash) }},={{ $json.allConsidered.map(i => i.source_id) }},={{ $json.allConsidered.map(i => i.url) }},={{ $json.allConsidered.map(i => i.title) }},={{ $json.allConsidered.map(i => i.published_at) }},={{ $json.allConsidered.map(i => i.importance_score || 0) }},={{ $json.allConsidered.map(i => i.category) }},={{ $json.allConsidered.map(i => $json.selected.some(s => s.content_hash === i.content_hash)) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO digest_history (digest_date, item_count, items, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, cost_usd) VALUES ($1::date, $2::int, $3::jsonb, $4::int, $5::int, $6::numeric) ON CONFLICT (digest_date) DO UPDATE SET item_count = EXCLUDED.item_count, items = EXCLUDED.items, total_input_tokens = digest_history.total_input_tokens + EXCLUDED.total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens = digest_history.total_output_tokens + EXCLUDED.total_output_tokens, cost_usd = digest_history.cost_usd + EXCLUDED.cost_usd
